◆ Electrical & Insulation Tapes

PVC Electrical Insulation Tape

Deon® 31700 · PVC Film / Rubber Adhesive

High-quality PVC electrical insulation tape with rubber adhesive, engineered for reliable insulation, strong bonding, and consistent performance in general-purpose electrical applications.

5.6–6.0 kV
Breakdown voltage
0.110–0.120 mm

Features

Why specify Deon 31700

  • ◆

    High dielectric strength

    Reliable insulation for general-purpose electrical work.

  • ◆

    Flexible PVC backing

    Conforms and wraps easily around conductors and joints.

  • ◆

    Flame retardant

    Self-extinguishing backing for added safety.

  • ◆

    UV, moisture & chemical resistant

    Holds up in demanding indoor and outdoor environments.

Applications

Where it's used

  • →

    Insulation of wires & cables

    Primary insulation and re-insulation of electrical conductors.

  • →

    Bundling & harnessing

    Neat, secure bundling of wiring assemblies.

  • →

    Protection of conductors

    Guards against abrasion, moisture and environmental exposure.

Colour coding: six standard colours support phase identification and organised, standards-compliant wiring.
